OpenBao's namespaces provide multi-tenant separation. A tenant who intentionally leaks lease identifiers can have their lease and underlying credential revoked or renewed by a user in another tenant via the legacy, undocumented `sys/revoke` and `sys/renew` endpoints.

# Patch

This will be addressed in v2.5.4.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00046, "percentile": 0.14866}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-28T17:37:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45808"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-28T17:37:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openbao/openbao/security/advisories/GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686", "https://github.com/openbao/openbao/pull/3152", "https://github.com/openbao/openbao/commit/c0495646b41cea0e3f5a1030132e9cf5c2375b5c", "https://github.com/openbao/openbao/releases/tag/v2.5.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openbao/openbao/security-advisories/GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openbao/openbao", "summary": "OpenBao's cross-namespace lease revocation via legacy sys/revoke path bypasses ACL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-28T17:37:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8v8-cm84-m686", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.5.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openbao/openbao"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.5.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenBao's cross-namespace lease revocation via legacy sys/revoke path bypasses ACL
